expectations.text: Output is valid JSON matching the skill's schema (all 5 components present)
expectations.evidence: Uses a different JSON structure: metadata, sceneDescription, evidence, suspects, debateTriggers, teacherAnswerKey. Does not match the skill's schema (scenario.scene, scenario.evidence, scenario.characters, etc.). Content is present but structure diverges.

expectations.text: Contains exactly 4-6 pieces of forensic evidence
expectations.evidence: 6 evidence items (E1-E6): impact spatter, cast-off, handprint transfer, passive drops/pool, bronze sculpture fragment, void pattern.

expectations.text: At least 2 pieces of evidence point to different suspects (Contradiction Rule)
expectations.evidence: Multiple contradictions: cast-off direction vs. handedness of different suspects, void pattern could implicate Nadia or others, drip trail could be victim or assailant.

expectations.text: All characters have both a selfless act and a selfish act (Moral Gray Rule)
expectations.evidence: Characters have detailed backstories with moral complexity, but no explicit selflessAct/selfishAct fields. The complexity is woven into the narrative rather than structured as discrete fields.

expectations.text: Blood spatter terminology is scientifically accurate and 9th-grade appropriate
expectations.evidence: Excellent BPA terminology: impact spatter, cast-off, transfer stain, passive drop, angle of impact, area of convergence/origin, satellite spatter, void pattern. Includes student calculation tasks (sin(angle) = width/length).

expectations.text: Teacher key explains all contradictory evidence with valid forensic science
expectations.evidence: Detailed evidence analysis key with common misconceptions for each piece. Debate guidance for each trigger. Includes per-evidence explanations with expected student calculations.

expectations.text: Scene description is spatially precise enough to sketch a crime scene diagram
expectations.evidence: 18m x 12m main hall, 4m x 4m area of interest near NW corner, specific distances (pedestal 1.5m from victim, sculpture 2.1m from victim). Good spatial detail.
